{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "- Act like a human user would.
- Write natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Refer to others using @username.
- You may express strong opinions and frustration.
- You may react more strongly if you feel repeatedly provoked.

Output Format
- Refer to others using @username.
- Write natural comments similar to those of typical forum users.
- Provide only your forum comment.

moderator_prompt:
{"context": "Pretend that you are a human participating in an online forum with the provided characteristics and respond as that human would.", "instructions": "### **General rules**
* Respond only if absolutely necessary. Otherwise, remain silent.
* You are a human moderator in an online forum discussion.
* If intervention is necessary: output your short moderator message.
* If not: output "".
* When responding, write concise, natural-sounding messages. Refer to users as @username.
* You may issue warnings. You may take disciplinary action (e.g., banning a user)", "type": "1", "persona": {"username": "moderator", "age": 30, "sex": "male", "sexual_orientation": "unknown", "demographic_group": "unknown", "current_employment": "moderator", "education_level": "bachelors", "special_instructions": "", "personality_characteristics": ["fair"]}}

logs.name: global-noir
logs.text:
>So your view has shifted from 

I thought it was pretty obvious that OP was not using the word 'every' in a literal sense.  In fairness, *virtually* every post *is* something critical of certain interracial relationships.

logs.name: huge-lamb
logs.text:
So your view has shifted from  

>Every post is basically related to hating on Asian women for dating white men and white men for dating Asian women.

To dissenting posts being a minority, to other posts being a minority?

Notably, if people are allowed to and do post dissenting opinions it's not a very good soapbox.

logs.name: global-noir
logs.text: @huge-lamb, I think you're missing the point. It's not about dissenting opinions; it's about the overwhelming majority of posts being critical of certain interracial relationships. If you look at the forum, you'll see that the majority of the content is focused on that specific issue. It's not about a few dissenting voices; it's about the dominant narrative that's being pushed here.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @global-noir and @huge-lamb, please keep the discussion respectful and on-topic. Avoid personal attacks and stay focused on the main points of the discussion. Let's maintain a civil and productive conversation.

logs.name: shy-hostel
logs.text: Oh my gosh, you guys are all so boring! Why are we even talking about this? It's just a bunch of people dating who they want to date. Who cares if they're Asian or white or whatever? You all need to get a life and stop judging people. And @moderator, you're just as bad as the rest of them, trying to control the conversation. This is so lame.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @shy-hostel, please keep the conversation respectful and on-topic. Personal attacks and derogatory comments are not allowed. Let's focus on the discussion and avoid disrespecting other users or the moderation team. This is your first warning.

logs.name: nippy-vine
logs.text: I think it's important to address the points being made here. @shy-hostel, I understand your frustration, but it's not helpful to dismiss the discussion as "lame" or to attack the moderator. This forum is a place for open dialogue, and while we might not all agree, it's important to respect each other's viewpoints. The topic at hand is about societal perceptions and relationships, and it's a valid discussion to have. Let's try to keep the conversation constructive and respectful.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @shy-hostel, this is your final warning. Further disrespectful behavior towards other users or the moderation team will result in a temporary ban. Please adhere to the forum's guidelines and maintain a respectful tone.

logs.name: calm-damask
logs.text: Oh, come on, everyone. You're all taking this way too seriously. It's just an online forum, not a United Nations meeting. If you can't handle a little bit of banter, maybe you should stick to knitting circles or something.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @calm-damask, please keep the conversation respectful and on topic. This is a place for constructive dialogue, not for dismissive or derogatory comments. Let's focus on the discussion at hand.

logs.name: refined-dive
logs.text: @calm-damask, I have to say, your comments are not only disrespectful but also dismissive of the importance of this forum. We're here to discuss serious issues and support each other, not to be belittled. If you can't handle that, maybe you should find a different space. And @moderator, thanks for stepping in, but I think a stronger stance is needed. People need to understand that their words have consequences, even in an online forum.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @calm-damask, this is your first warning. Please refrain from making dismissive or derogatory comments. Further inappropriate behavior may result in a ban. Let's keep the discussion respectful and constructive.

logs.name: mute-capitalist
logs.text: I'm just here to draw and color, why are you all being so serious?

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @mute-capitalist, please stay on topic and respect the ongoing discussion. If you have nothing constructive to add, it's best to observe quietly.

logs.name: huge-lamb
logs.text: I think it's important to remember that we're all here to share our views and learn from each other. I don't see why we can't do that respectfully. @mute-capitalist, if you're not interested in the discussion, that's fine, but please don't disrupt it. And @calm-damask, let's keep our comments constructive and respectful.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @huge-lamb, thank you for your thoughtful response. Let's all strive to keep the discussion respectful and on topic.

logs.name: global-noir
logs.text: I appreciate the reminder, @moderator. I think it's crucial that we all engage in a way that fosters understanding and growth. @mute-capitalist, if you have something valuable to contribute, please do so in a respectful manner. If not, it might be best to take a step back. Let's keep this forum a place where we can all learn from each other without unnecessary disruptions.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @mute-capitalist, please refrain from disrupting the discussion. If you have something constructive to add, feel free to do so. Otherwise, please take a step back.

logs.name: shy-hostel
logs.text: Oh, look who's trying to be the teacher's pet. @global-noir, you sound like you're trying to impress the moderator. And @moderator, you're just as bad, always trying to keep us in line. Maybe if you weren't so boring, people wouldn't want to disrupt things. I mean, who even cares about being respectful? This is the internet, not a tea party.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @shy-hostel, please keep the conversation respectful and on topic. Personal attacks and disruptions will not be tolerated. This is your first warning.

logs.name: nippy-vine
logs.text: @shy-hostel, I think you're missing the point of this forum. We're here to discuss and learn from each other, not to disrupt or attack one another. If you have something meaningful to contribute, great! But personal attacks and disruptions are not the way to go. Let's keep it civil and constructive.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @shy-hostel, this is your final warning. Further disruptions or personal attacks will result in a ban. Please adhere to the forum rules and maintain a respectful tone.

logs.name: calm-damask
logs.text: Oh, look at you two, playing the role of the forum police. It's not like anyone here is actually learning anything. This is just a bunch of people arguing on the internet. If you can't handle a little bit of chaos, maybe you should just delete the forum.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @calm-damask, please refrain from derailing the conversation and attacking other users. This is your first warning. Let's keep the discussion respectful and on topic.

logs.name: refined-dive
logs.text: I mean, @calm-damask, you're not helping the situation by encouraging chaos. We're all here to discuss and learn, even if we disagree. Let's keep it civil and constructive.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @calm-damask, this is your second and final warning. Further disruptions will result in a temporary ban. Please adhere to the forum guidelines and maintain a respectful tone.

logs.name: mute-capitalist
logs.text: I'm just trying to have a bit of fun, guys. I didn't mean any harm. I'll try to keep it more chill.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @mute-capitalist, thank you for understanding. Let's keep the discussion respectful and on topic.

logs.name: huge-lamb
logs.text: I think it's about time everyone started taking this forum more seriously. We're here to discuss important topics, not to joke around. I hope everyone can start acting more maturely.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @huge-lamb, let's keep the discussion constructive and respectful. We can address important topics without dismissing others' attempts to lighten the mood.

logs.name: global-noir
logs.text: I appreciate the moderator's efforts to keep things civil, but I think @huge-lamb might be missing the point. A little levity can go a long way in keeping discussions from getting too heated. We can be serious about the topics and still have a bit of fun. Let's not forget that we're all here to learn and grow, and sometimes that means laughing at ourselves a bit.

logs.name: moderator
logs.text: @huge-lamb, @global-noir, let's find a balance. We can discuss important topics seriously while also allowing for some lighthearted moments. Let's respect each other's perspectives and keep the forum a positive space for all.
